headline: 3 Dividend Stocks Yielding Over 3.2% To Enhance Your Portfolio
summary: The United States market has experienced a notable upswing, rising 1.8% over the last week and showing an impressive 30% increase over the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 16% annually in the coming years.
